narrative:
Bay Village-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,036 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.3 percentage points.
